provincial_monitoring: Official notification of the alert on 8 May 2026 following rumours of grouped deaths. Updating of epidemiological situation and line lists of suspected and probable cases. Sample collection, analysis and shipment to INRB.

Briefing of surveillance teams on alerts, investigations, active case search, contact listing and follow-up. Briefing of PoE/PoC team on mapping of their sites. Organisation of the surveillance pillar (focal points per HZ, roles and responsibilities). Deployment of surveillance teams in 3 epidemic HZ: Bunia, Rwampara and Nyankunde.

Mapping of confirmed cases: Bunia and Rwampara HZ. Active case search: Bunia, Bambu, Rwampara, Nyankunde HZ. Investigation around EVD alerts: Bunia, Mongbwalu, Rwampara, Nyankunde, Komanda, Mangala, Bambu and Aru HZ. Ofoo/ZS Aru: traveller from Bukavu via Kigali, Uganda, bound for Durba. PoE Kasenyi/ZS Tchomia: a dead body from Uganda/Kampala bound for Bunia city.

Support to Katwa and Goma HZ in in-depth investigation and contact listing around confirmed cases. Setting up of an alert management system (promotion of the civil-protection toll-free number). Start of contact follow-up around the confirmed case in Goma HZ. In-depth investigations and contact listing around 4 confirmed cases in North Kivu.

Transmission to coordination of Terms of Reference for deployment of provincial multidisciplinary teams in Mongbwalu HZ. Transmission to coordination of TOR for training of actors (ECZS, IT & ITA, community agent leads, data managers) in 5 active HZ. Provision of thermo-flash in Nizi HZ (4).

Development of draft Terms of Reference for deployment of provincial multidisciplinary teams in Mongbwalu HZ. Draft TOR for training of actors (ECZS, IT & ITA, community agent leads, data managers) in 5 active HZ. Provision of thermo-flash in Bunia (12) and Rwampara (11) HZ for contact follow-up.

Routine surveillance activities (alert reporting, investigations, active case search, contact listing and follow-up, retrospective case and death record review). In-depth investigations around confirmed cases in affected health zones (Bunia, Nyankunde and Rwampara). Alerts: 97 raised, 97 investigated (100%), 72 validated (74.2%). Contact tracing: 4,281 contacts under follow-up, 2,701 seen (63.1%) — improvement vs previous day (54.6%).
Alerts: 340 raised, 340 investigated (100%), 40 validated (11.8%). Contact tracing: 689 contacts under follow-up, 578 seen (83.9%) — improvement vs previous day (72.0%).
